endpoints.name: Sanguine Savior (MKM-230) — dual-coded Agency + Orzhov + symbol:orzhov-signet
Orzhov Signet — appears_on extended with Sanguine Savior

description: Six new Agency anchors wired in one fanout pass — Edgelord's professional sigh applies, with one note of genuine appreciation for Sanguine Savior's eclipsed-sun-medallion chest-plate doing the canonical Orzhov-recruited-Detective dual-coding work the agency.md institutional-thesis section predicted. The Living Conundrum body-elemental and the centaur Crowd-Control Warden together undermined the corpus-internal Sphinx-coded-Agency-officer pattern; the unifying register is FUNCTION (Detective subtype + Disguise/Investigate/Case mechanics + Foundway-Associates flavor) not creature-type, and the agency.md caveat now states that explicitly. The Crowd-Control Warden's G/W centaur-body Selesnya-coding stays a body-only note (no characters: secondary edge wired — selesnya-conclave node remains deferred per the janitor_triage 2-anchors-below-threshold status). Worth the work.
citations: [MTG Wiki: Ravnican Agency of Magicological Investigations]
[Wizards: Planeswalker's Guide to Murders at Karlov Manor, Emily Teng 2024-02-01]
[Wizards: Magic Story: Murders at Karlov Manor, Seanan McGuire episodes 1-7]
[Furtive Courier flavor_text: Linghu of the Foundway Associates — Agency-affiliated investigative network]
[Sanguine Savior vision: eclipsed-sun medallion on chest armor + sun-spire in skyline — Orzhov Signet canonical iconography per orzhov-signet.md]
[Shady Informant flavor_text: 'Rakdos snitches rarely survive to get stitches.' — surfaced as criminal-side anchor, NOT Agency-wired]
other_candidates_considered: Selesnya Conclave faction-character node — Crowd-Control Warden (193) is centaur-body-coded G/W but the node remains deferred at 2 corpus anchors (Branch of Vitu-Ghazi, Selesnya Locket); Warden could be the 3rd anchor when triggered. Janitor triage entry already exists.
Disguise as second MKM symbol-layer node — most MKM creatures bear Disguise, would easily clear the ≥3 threshold; deferred for a future Nodeley pass to avoid overreach in one wave.
